'''Task Force Apex''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth Fleet]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Apex was placed under the temporary command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] and led by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Farley Carson]] from ''[[Yakez]]''. It served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]'s plan that culminated in [[Operation Strong Hand]]. ''Yakez'' and all hands were lost during the [[Battle of N'zoth]].
